name: agentic-runner
description: Agentic Runner control-plane for routing coding-agents, Agentic StructCiv, and CodexVideo workflows with handoff, resume, audit, and supervised assignments.

interface.shortDescription: Control-plane for Agentic Runner routing across coding-agents, Agentic StructCiv, CodexVideo, handoff, resume, audit, and supervised assignments.
interface.longDescription: Coordinates route state for coding-agents, Agentic StructCiv, and CodexVideo. Helps track control-plane decisions, handoff artifacts, resume checkpoints, cross-workflow audit context, and supervised assignments while specialist workflows produce their domain outputs.
defaultPrompt: Use Agentic Runner to coordinate control-plane routing for coding-agents, Agentic StructCiv, or CodexVideo.
Track handoff, resume, audit context, and supervised assignments for the selected workflow.
